name: python3-pgspecial
title: python3-pgspecial
description:
Meta-commands handler for Postgres Database (Python 3)
This package provides an API to execute meta-commands (AKA "special", or
"backslash commands") on PostgreSQL.
.
This package is for Python 3 environment.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pgspecial because Meta-commands handler for Postgres Database (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pgspecial as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pgspecial with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pgspecial --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
